title: croton matudae
intro: Croton matudae, also known as the Philippine croton, is a species of flowering plant in the family Euphorbiaceae. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Croton matudae include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate pain, and treat various skin conditions. Herbal preparations of Croton matudae are often made into teas, infusions, or topical creams, and it is also used in some traditional remedies for its purported antiseptic properties.
